final_answer: One current student project in the MIT Modeling Multimodal AI 2026 course is 'MMoE: Enhancing Multimodal Models with Mixtures of Multimodal Interaction Experts'. This project aims to improve the performance and robustness of multimodal models by incorporating mixtures of experts designed to handle complex interactions between different modalities.

final_answer: Toolformer and MemGPT are both advanced AI language models. Toolformer integrates external tools into its architecture, making it suitable for tasks requiring interaction with the outside world. MemGPT focuses on memory management and context retention, ensuring coherent and contextually relevant responses over extended dialogues.
